title: Pichonia deplanchei
intro: Pichonia deplanchei, also known as the Pichonia tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. The health benefits of Pichonia deplanchei include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of Pichonia deplanchei include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Pichonia deplanchei is often used to make various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
taxonomy: Pichonia deplanchei belongs to the family Sapotaceae, a family of flowering plants that includes many tropical species. This family is commonly known as the sapote family. The Sapotaceae family is part of the larger order Ericales, which includes a wide variety of flowering plants.
